Sell faster,
track stock tighter,
keep debts clear.

ai.restockHint: Suggested purchases from the last 30 days of sales velocity.
ai.assistantNotice: Assistant preview — connect an AI provider (API key) to get real answers.
ai.actionNotice: Action framework preview - AI drafts, writes audit, and waits for confirmation before mutating data.
ai.assistantEmpty: Ask about sales, stock, or what to restock.
ai.posEmpty: Use quick POS commands, check stock, or create a cart draft.
ai.placeholderReply: AI provider not configured yet — answers will appear once an API key is enabled.

suggestions.posFindLowStockCart: Find low-stock items in the cart
suggestions.receiveRobusta: Receive 20 cartons of Robusta coffee into the main warehouse

createInvoice.label: Create invoice
createInvoice.emptyText: Send the customer, item list, and quantities.
createInvoice.placeholder: Example: Walk-in customer, 2 Robusta coffees, 1 pork sandwich...
createInvoice.promptPrefix:
[AI_ACTION_PRESET:order_action]
Create a sales invoice from the following user information. Read item names and quantities to draft the sales order; do not record payment unless the user says it was paid.

User information:
createInvoice.example1: Walk-in customer: 2 Robusta coffees, 1 pork sandwich
createInvoice.example2: Nam takes 5 recessed 8W lights, sell on credit

draftPurchaseOrder.label: Order stock
draftPurchaseOrder.emptyText: Send the items to order, supplier, and warehouse if available.
draftPurchaseOrder.placeholder: Example: Order 20 cartons of Robusta coffee from Supplier A to the main warehouse...
draftPurchaseOrder.promptPrefix:
[AI_ACTION_PRESET:create_draft_purchase_order]
Create a draft purchase order from the following user information. Only create a draft PO; do not receive stock or record payment.

User information:
draftPurchaseOrder.example1: Order 20 cartons of Robusta coffee from Supplier A to the main warehouse
draftPurchaseOrder.example2: Order 10 double 32A breakers and 5 recessed 8W lights

createInventoryInbound.label: Receive stock
createInventoryInbound.emptyText: Send received items, quantities, supplier, and warehouse.
createInventoryInbound.placeholder: Example: Receive 20 cartons of Robusta coffee into the main warehouse from Supplier A...
createInventoryInbound.promptPrefix:
[AI_ACTION_PRESET:create_inventory_inbound]
Create an inventory inbound receipt from the following user information. This is real stock receiving; build a preview and require confirmation before adding stock.

User information:
createInventoryInbound.example1: Receive 20 cartons of Robusta coffee into the main warehouse from Supplier A
createInventoryInbound.example2: Receive 5 recessed 8W lights at 90,000 from Rang Dong

errors.tooManyAttachments: Attach up to {max} files per message.
errors.unsupportedAttachment: {name} is not supported. Supported files: PNG, JPG, WebP, PDF, CSV, XLSX.
errors.speechUnsupported: This browser does not support speech-to-text yet.
errors.speechError: Could not hear the voice input. Try again or type it manually.
errors.attachmentUploading: Files are still uploading. Wait a moment, then send again.
errors.attachmentFailed: A file upload failed. Remove the failed file or attach it again.

session.renameDescription: The new name will be saved to AI chat history.
session.deleteDescription: This chat and its messages will be hidden from history.
session.deleteWarning: Delete "{title}"? This does not affect audit logs or business records already created.
session.uploadNotice: Uploading file. Wait until it finishes before sending.
session.exhaustedNotice: AI usage is exhausted this month. The owner can raise the limit in Settings > AI.

composer.attachmentPlaceholder: Enter a request for the attached file...

preview.posDraftLines: {count} lines captured · review before sending to POS
preview.pendingConfirmation: No data changed · waiting for confirmation
preview.strongAcknowledgement: I reviewed the preview and understand the impact of this action.
preview.noMutationYet: No data changed. Review before confirming.

strong.applyPriceFormula: This may update prices in bulk. Review the price book and affected products before confirming.
strong.recordInvoicePayment: This records cash movement and invoice payment status. Reconcile the cash book after confirming.
strong.cancelInvoice: This may cancel a document, return stock, reverse debt, and affect revenue reports.
strong.createReturnRefund: This may create a return/refund, update stock, and record cash movement.
strong.sendEinvoice: This may send invoice data to the e-invoice provider and create a legal status.
strong.createCashbookEntry: This creates a cashbook transaction. Review the amount, income/expense type, and note.
strong.convertQuoteToOrder: This converts a quote into a sales order and may affect stock.
strong.createOrder: This creates a draft sales order from AI. Review the customer, line items, and total.
strong.default: This is a business-impacting action. Review the preview, warnings, and related record before confirming.

q.todaySales: How much did we sell today?

tables.title: Tables
tables.emptyCart: No items yet — search to add.
tables.mergeHint: Tap occupied tables to merge (first ★ is the target).
tables.splitHint: Pick lines to settle separately; the rest stays on the table.

modifiers.sub: Option groups (sugar, ice, size, toppings…) shown when ordering.
modifiers.name: Group name
modifiers.applyHint: Leave empty to apply to all items.

import.title: Import data
import.intro: Import products from KiotViet, Sapo, POS365 or any spreadsheet — CSV or Excel (.xlsx). KiotViet's product export works directly: headers are auto-mapped and conversion-unit rows are skipped. Map columns, preview, then confirm. Existing products are matched by code (SKU).
import.choose: Choose a CSV or Excel file
import.csvOnly: CSV (.csv) or Excel (.xlsx) — incl. KiotViet product export

errors.parse: Couldn't read the file. Use CSV or .xlsx.
errors.needName: Map the Product name column first.

shifts.openSub: Start your register with an opening float.

errors.alreadyOpen: You already have an open shift.

internalUse.approvalBanner: Total cost {amount} exceeds the ₫500,000 threshold — needs manager approval.
internalUse.emptyForm: Search products above to add to this issue.

orders.title: Orders

detail.cancelConfirm: Cancel this order? Stock will be restored and debt adjusted.

orders.batchEmpty: No orders selected — go back and tick some.

customers.title: Customers
customers.collectHint: Open each order to record collections.

actions.deleteDisabled: Deleting customers with documents is not supported yet; stop activity to hide them from the active list.

confirm.stop: Stop this customer? They will no longer appear in active selling lists.

filters.title: Customer filters
filters.noData: This data field is not available yet

expand.emptySales: No sales or return history yet

purchases.title: Purchasing
purchases.cancelConfirm: Cancel this purchase receipt? Stock, supplier debt, and paid amount will be reversed.
purchases.emptyHint: Create a purchase to add stock and update cost prices.
purchases.noSuppliers: No suppliers — create one in Suppliers
purchases.receiveHint: Receive now: stock is added, cost price updated, unpaid balance recorded as supplier debt.

errors.notEditable: This purchase receipt cannot be edited or cancelled.
errors.alreadyCancelled: This purchase receipt was already cancelled.

errors.emptyItems: Select at least 1 item to return.
errors.debtNeedsCustomer: Debt deduction requires a customer on the order.
errors.debtTooSmall: Current debt is less than the refund — use cash/bank instead.

print.title: Print invoice
print.footerNote: Please inspect goods upon delivery. Unopened items may be returned within 7 days.

printSettings.title: Print templates

printSettings.appliedAll: Applied to all 5 templates — remember to Save each.

settings.moreSoon: More settings (staff, permissions, e-invoice…) coming with the roadmap.

quotes.title: Quotes
quotes.emptyHint: Build a cart in POS then press 'Save quote'.
quotes.convertConfirm: Convert this quote to a sale? Stock will be deducted and debt recorded.

errors.notAQuote: This is not an open quote.

cashbook.title: Cash book
cashbook.autoHint: Sales, collections, supplier payments and refunds are recorded automatically

orderEdit.title: Edit {code}
orderEdit.warning: Editing restores stock for old lines and deducts for new ones; debt adjusts by the difference. Orders with returns can't be edited.

errors.hasEInvoice: An e-invoice was issued — can't edit/cancel. Void the e-invoice first.

merge.title: Merge invoices
merge.noneSelected: Nothing selected — go back and tick orders.
merge.hint: Items and payments move to the merged order; originals become 'Merged' (stock & debt unchanged). Same customer only, no returns.

errors.hasReturns: An order has returns — can't merge.
errors.hasEInvoice: An order already has an e-invoice — can't merge.

projects.title: Projects
projects.emptyHint: Create projects to attach to POS sales.

promos.title: Promotions
promos.emptyHint: Create quantity-tier discounts — POS applies them automatically.
promos.posHint: POS applies the best tier by quantity (in base units) and shows a promo badge on the line.

delivery.title: Delivery / dispatch
delivery.emptyHint: Group sold orders into a trip for delivery.

einvoice.title: E-invoice
einvoice.stubNote: Using internal stub issuer — sequential numbers. Swap issueWithProvider() for real Viettel/VNPT/MISA integration.
einvoice.emptyHint: Issue from the order detail page.

errors.alreadyIssued: This order already has an e-invoice.

portal.desc: Generate a private link so this customer can order at their price group — orders arrive pending confirmation.
portal.hint: Share via Zalo. Generating a new link invalidates the old one.

pricing.markupHint: (applies to visible rows, remember to Save each)

stocktakes.title: Stocktake
stocktakes.emptyHint: Create one to count actual stock and balance inventory.
stocktakes.searchPlaceholder: Search product by name / SKU to add…
stocktakes.noLines: Nothing counted yet — search above to add products.
stocktakes.balanceConfirm: Balance now? Stock will be SET to counted quantities; differences logged as adjustments.
stocktakes.balanceHint: Drafts don't affect stock. Balancing sets stock = actual and logs 'adjust' movements.
